tasks.title: Analyze Database connection lifecycle in apps/web/src/services/storage/Database.ts
tasks.description: Review the Database.ts file to understand how the database connection is opened, closed, and accessed. Identify where getDb() is called and how the DB instance is managed. Look for any code paths that might use the DB without opening it first or after closing it.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear understanding of DB connection lifecycle in Database.ts
List of code locations where DB is accessed without guaranteed open connection
tasks.expectedResult: A documented analysis of the DB connection lifecycle and potential misuse points in Database.ts

outputPlan.description: Analysis document describing DB connection lifecycle and misuse points

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides root cause understanding for the database closed error

tasks.title: Identify all usages of database access in the project to find improper getDb() calls
tasks.description: Search the entire project source code for all usages of the database instance or getDb() function. Identify any places where the DB is accessed without calling getDb() first or where the DB might be closed prematurely. Document these locations for targeted fixes.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete list of all source files and code locations accessing the DB
Identification of improper DB usage patterns
tasks.expectedResult: A list of all files and code locations accessing the DB, highlighting improper usage

outputPlan.description: Document listing all database access points and improper usage

metadata.inputContext: Project source code and previous analysis document
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides comprehensive overview of DB usage for targeted fixes

tasks.title: Fix improper database usage by enforcing getDb() call before any DB access
tasks.description: Modify all identified source files where the database is accessed without a prior getDb() call. Refactor code to ensure getDb() is called to open the connection before any DB operations. Remove any direct DB instance usage that bypasses getDb().
acceptanceCriteria: All DB access points use getDb() to obtain an open DB connection
No code accesses DB after it has been closed
tasks.expectedResult: Codebase refactored to safely open DB connections before access, preventing 'Database is closed' errors

outputPlan.description: Refactor Database.ts to enforce getDb() usage and safe DB connection handling

metadata.inputContext: Analysis documents and list of improper DB usage locations
evidence: git diff shows getDb() usage enforced
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Fixes root cause of DB closed error by enforcing proper DB connection usage

tasks.title: Add defensive checks in Database.ts to prevent DB usage when closed
tasks.description: Enhance the Database.ts module by adding defensive checks before any DB operation to verify the DB connection is open. If the DB is closed, throw a clear error or automatically call getDb() to reopen. This prevents runtime errors from closed DB usage.
acceptanceCriteria: Database.ts methods verify DB connection state before operations
No runtime errors occur due to closed DB usage
tasks.expectedResult: Database.ts is robust against closed DB usage with defensive checks and automatic reopening

outputPlan.description: Add connection state checks and automatic reopening logic

metadata.inputContext: Refactored Database.ts with enforced getDb() usage
evidence: git diff shows added defensive checks
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves robustness of DB access preventing closed DB errors

tasks.title: Add unit tests to verify getDb() opens DB and prevents closed DB usage
tasks.description: Create new unit tests in apps/web/src/services/storage/Database.test.ts to verify that getDb() opens the database connection properly and that DB operations fail gracefully or reopen if the DB is closed. Cover edge cases of DB close and reopen.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover DB open, close, and reopen scenarios
Tests verify no 'Database is closed' errors occur unexpectedly
tasks.expectedResult: New unit tests added and passing, verifying DB connection management correctness

outputPlan.description: Add tests for getDb() connection lifecycle and closed DB handling

metadata.inputContext: Modified Database.ts with defensive connection checks
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures DB connection management is tested and reliable

tasks.title: Run full test suite to validate no regressions after DB connection fixes
tasks.description: Execute the full project test suite to ensure that the fixes for the 'Database is closed' error did not introduce regressions or break other functionality. Confirm all tests pass cleanly.
acceptanceCriteria: All tests pass without errors or failures
tasks.expectedResult: Full test suite passes confirming stability after DB fixes

metadata.inputContext: All code changes for DB connection fixes and new tests
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Validates overall project stability after DB connection fixes
